    Index

    A C D E G H I L M O P R S T 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    G

    GameController - Class in com.example.elcincuentazo.controller
    Controlador de juego independiente de JavaFX/FXML.
    GameController(GameLogic) - Constructor for class com.example.elcincuentazo.controller.GameController
    Construye un GameController sobre un GameLogic ya configurado (es decir, setupGame(...) ya fue llamado por quien crea esta instancia, normalmente el controlador del menú).
    GameEventListener - Interface in com.example.elcincuentazo.model
    Observer interface that the View/Controller implements to react to game events.
    GameEventListener - Interface in com.example.elcincuentazo.observer
    Observer interface that the View/Controller implements to react to game events.
    GameLogic - Class in com.example.elcincuentazo.model
    Central game-logic engine for Cincuentazo.
    GameLogic() - Constructor for class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameLogic
    Constructs a new GameLogic instance.
    GameOverException - Exception Class in com.example.elcincuentazo.exceptions
    Unchecked (runtime) exception thrown when an operation is requested on a game that has already ended.
    GameOverException - Exception Class in com.example.elcincuentazo.model
    Unchecked (runtime) exception thrown when an operation is requested on a game that has already ended.
    GameOverException() - Constructor for exception class com.example.elcincuentazo.exceptions.GameOverException
    Constructs a GameOverException without a known winner.
    GameOverException() - Constructor for exception class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameOverException
    Constructs a GameOverException without a known winner.
    GameOverException(String) - Constructor for exception class com.example.elcincuentazo.exceptions.GameOverException
    Constructs a GameOverException identifying the winner.
    GameOverException(String) - Constructor for exception class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameOverException
    Constructs a GameOverException identifying the winner.
    GameScreenController - Class in com.example.elcincuentazo.controller
    Controlador de GameScreen.fxml.
    GameScreenController() - Constructor for class com.example.elcincuentazo.controller.GameScreenController
     
    GameScreenView - Class in com.example.elcincuentazo.view
    Vista de la pantalla de juego.
    GameScreenView(GameLogic, int) - Constructor for class com.example.elcincuentazo.view.GameScreenView
    Carga el FXML del juego, inyecta el modelo y muestra la ventana.
    GameState - Class in com.example.elcincuentazo.model
    Immutable snapshot of the game state at a specific point in time.
    GameState(List, Card, int, int, Player, Player, boolean) - Constructor for class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameState
    Constructs a new GameState snapshot.
    getActivePlayers() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameLogic
    Returns only the players who are still active.
    getActivePlayers() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameState
    Returns only the active (non-eliminated) players.
    getAttemptedDelta() - Method in exception class com.example.elcincuentazo.exceptions.InvalidCardPlayException
    Returns the delta value the attempted card would have contributed.
    getAttemptedDelta() - Method in exception class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.InvalidCardPlayException
    Returns the delta value the attempted card would have contributed.
    getCard(int) - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.PlayerHand
    Returns the card at the given index without removing it.
    getCards() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.Player
    Returns an unmodifiable view of the cards currently in this player's hand.
    getCards() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.PlayerHand
    Returns an unmodifiable view of all cards currently in this hand.
    getCurrentPlayer() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameLogic
    Returns the player who is currently taking their turn.
    getCurrentPlayer() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameState
    Returns the player who is currently taking their turn.
    getCurrentSum() - Method in exception class com.example.elcincuentazo.exceptions.InvalidCardPlayException
    Returns the table sum that was active when the illegal play was attempted.
    getCurrentSum() - Method in exception class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.InvalidCardPlayException
    Returns the table sum that was active when the illegal play was attempted.
    getDeck() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameLogic
    Returns the Deck used in this game.
    getDeckSize() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameState
    Returns the number of cards remaining in the draw pile.
    getGameState() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameLogic
    Returns a snapshot of the current game state suitable for passing to the View layer without exposing mutable internals.
    getHand() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.Player
    Returns the hand of cards held by this player.
    getModel() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.controller.GameController
    Devuelve el modelo de juego, para que la View pueda consultar el estado actual (jugadores, mazo, suma, turno) al momento de renderizar.
    getName() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.Player
    Returns the display name of this player.
    getPlayableCards(int) - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.MachinePlayer
    Returns all cards in the machine's hand that could legally be played.
    getPlayers() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameLogic
    Returns an unmodifiable view of all players (active and eliminated), in the turn order established at setup.
    getPlayers() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameState
    Returns an unmodifiable list of all players (active and eliminated), in turn order.
    getSuit() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.Card
    Returns the suit code of this card.
    getTablePile() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.Deck
    Returns an unmodifiable snapshot of the entire table pile in play order (index 0 = most recently played).
    getTableSum() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameLogic
    Returns the current accumulated sum on the table.
    getTableSum() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameState
    Returns the current accumulated table sum.
    getTopTableCard() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameState
    Returns the card currently on top of the table pile.
    getValue() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.Card
    Returns the face value of this card.
    getWinner() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameLogic
    Returns the winning player, or null if the game is not yet over.
    getWinner() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameState
    Returns the winning player if the game has ended.
    getWinnerName() - Method in exception class com.example.elcincuentazo.exceptions.GameOverException
    Returns the name of the winner, or null if not provided.
    getWinnerName() - Method in exception class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameOverException
    Returns the name of the winner, or null if not provided.
